data.title: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to document CLI_user tag and Gate 1a skip
data.description:
## Context

SAFEGUARD FILE — sub-agent must show a diff and receive explicit user approval before editing CLAUDE.md (Never-Do rule 18).

## What to change

Update CLAUDE.md in two places:

1. **Quick Reference table** (around line 32): Add [--tags <tag>] to the ticket create row:
   `.claude/scripts/dso ticket create <type> <title> [-d/--description <text>] [--tags <tag1,tag2>]`

2. **Architecture section — Ticket system v3** (around line 43): Add a sentence after the existing ticket system description documenting the --tags flag and CLI_user tag:
   'The --tags flag sets tags atomically at creation time (comma-separated). The CLI_user tag marks bugs reported explicitly by a human during an interactive session; /dso:fix-bug Gate 1a skips the dso:intent-search dispatch for CLI_user-tagged bugs, setting GATE_1A_RESULT="intent-aligned" directly.'

3. **Agent routing table** (around line 59): Update the dso:intent-search row description to note the CLI_user skip:
   '/dso:fix-bug Step 1.5 (Gate 1a — pre-investigation intent search; skipped for CLI_user-tagged bugs)'

## Files to modify

- CLAUDE.md (SAFEGUARD — requires explicit user approval, show diff before editing)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] CLAUDE.md ticket create Quick Reference entry includes --tags
  Verify: grep -q 'tags' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md architecture section mentions CLI_user tag and Gate 1a skip
  Verify: grep -q 'CLI_user' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md dso:intent-search row mentions CLI_user skip
  Verify: grep -A1 'intent-search' CLAUDE.md | grep -q 'CLI_user'
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh exits 0 (including new CLI_user assertions)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-claude-md-fix-bug-gates.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py exits 0
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
